title: USDA forecasts US corn and soybean production up from 2019
summary: Corn and soybean production is up from 2019, according to the Crop Production report issued today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). Soybean production is up 21% from last year, forecast at 4.31 billion bushels; corn growers are expected to increase their production 9% from 2...
